title: Phaa Anor
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=Yuuzhan Vong |image= |name=Phaa Anor |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]]''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*Yuuzhan Vong **[[Intendant caste]] |domain=[[Domain Anor]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You were assumed dead.''"
"''I greet you as well, Phaa Anor.|Phaa Anor and Nom Anor|}} '''Phaa Anor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] of the [[intendant caste]] and a relative of [[Nom Anor]]. Phaa Anor was a subordinate to Nom Anor, who acted as an advance agent in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], which the Yuuzhan Vong had targeted for [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]]. Phaa Anor carried out duties on behalf of his relative during the invasion but came to believe that his superior was [[Death/Legends|dead]], as did the majority of Yuuzhan Vong, after Nom Anor disappeared following the disastrous defeat at the [[Battle of Ebaq]] 9 in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. At [[Ebaq 9]], Nom Anor promised the Yuuzhan Vong leadership a great victory, unaware that his intelligence sources were compromised, and was forced to disappear once he was confronted for his failure. Later that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Phaa Anor was contacted by his relative, who asked him to deliver a message concerning the existence of a mysterious [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|living planet]] to the ruler of the Yuuzhan Vong, [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|I have information so important that I believe I can redeem myself in the Supreme Overlord's eyes. Not only that, I believe I will be elevated for my efforts. Do you not think you will benefit as well, he who brings these tidings?''"
"''I will do it.|Nom Anor and Phaa Anor|}} [[File:NomAnor-TERC.png|thumb|left|190px|Phaa Anor was the domain cousin of Nom Anor and later served under him.]] [[Reproduction/Legends|Born]] into [[Domain Anor]], Phaa Anor was an [[Intendant caste|intendant]]—the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s caste of logistics and administrative experts. Phaa grew up in a crèche along with his [[domain]] cousin, [[Nom Anor]], who later became his superior. The two Yuuzhan Vong maintained contact by means of a pair of [[villip]]s, the organic communications devices of the Yuuzhan Vong. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' the Yuuzhan Vong [[Species/Legends|species]] initiated its [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|another galaxy]], having spent millennia traveling in the [[Intergalactic Void]] in search of a new home. During the resulting Yuuzhan Vong War, Phaa Anor's crèche cousin was tasked with destabilizing the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the major galactic government and the target of the [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet]]. Phaa Anor remained his crèche cousin's subordinate until [[28 ABY/Legends|three years]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' to [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]. As the novel establishes that the [[Battle of Ebaq]] took place a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] prior to its events, it must have occurred in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. into the war, when Nom Anor's failure to realize that his extensive [[Spy/Legends|spy]] network had been compromised led to a catastrophic Yuuzhan Vong defeat at the [[Battle of Ebaq]] 9. [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane]], the leader of the species, called for the skin of Nom Anor, who disappeared following the battle. After a [[29 ABY/Legends|year]] passed with no news of his superior, Phaa Anor, along with the majority of Yuuzhan Vong, assumed his relative to be dead. Thus, when Phaa Anor was contacted via villip by his crèche cousin, the intendant was shocked, and informed Nom Anor that he would have to report the conversation to Jamaane. To his mounting surprise, Anor was informed by his relative that he should in fact do exactly that, as Nom Anor claimed to have vitally important news for the Supreme Overlord. Phaa Anor was told to seek an audience with Jamaane, taking the message that Nom Anor was on the living [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]—a legendary world greatly feared by the Supreme Overlord—along with [[Nen Yim]], Jamaane's personal [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]], who had gone missing from the Supreme Overlord's [[Shimrra's Citadel|palace]] some days previously. Phaa Anor was incredulous, but Nom Anor asked him to take the message, as well as the villip itself, to Jamaane, as quickly as possible and with the utmost secrecy. Skeptical, Anor asked why he should do what was demanded of him, but was won over by his former superior's reply—Nom Anor expected great rewards for sending the message, so Phaa Anor should therefore expect great rewards for delivering it. Carrying out his relative's request, Phaa Anor took the message, and the villip, to Supreme Overlord Shimrra Jamaane. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Shimrra has called for your skin. I will have to report this conversation, of course.|Phaa Anor|}} Phaa Anor was loyal to the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] over his crèche cousin, and recognized his duty to his superiors. He was prone to both surprise and thoughtfulness, as well as ambition, drawn in by Nom Anor's suggestion that he would be rewarded for delivering the news on his crèche cousin's whereabouts. ==Behind the scenes== Phaa Anor first appeared via villip in [[Greg Keyes]]' [[2003]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'', which was part of the [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'' series]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}} {{C|via [[villip]]}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Phaa Anor }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Anor, Phaa}} [[Category:Domain Anor]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong intendants]]
